voice_observations.voiceover_text: 🎵 Heart beats louder 🎵 🎵🎵🎵 🎵 I'm in a toxic situation every time we kiss 🎵 🎵 I can't wait to see you this weekend 🎵 🎵 I think that's the real thing and you told me to finish 🎵 🎵 And if it's not I refuse to believe it 🎵 🎵 I refuse to believe it 🎵 🎵 Don't leave me here, I can't handle you leaving 🎵
